name: Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef stew meat, cut into 1 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. If using frozen vegetables, add them 1 hour before serving.
2. Optional substitutions: use 12 small pearl onions instead of the onions; substitute 1 cup dry red wine and 1 cup water for the water alone; substitute 2 cups cooked small pasta for the potatoes.
3. In a bowl, mix flour with salt and pepper. Toss to coat the beef cubes.
4. Set aside the excess flour.
5. Brown the meat on all sides in a skillet using vegetable oil.
6. Transfer the browned meat to a crockpot.
7. Add bay leaf and vegetables to the pot.
8. In a separate bowl, combine bouillon cubes, Kitchen Bouquet, Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, paprika (if used), and water. Mix well.
9. Pour the mixture over the vegetables in the crockpot.
10. Cook on low for 12 to 14 hours or on high for 6 to 8 hours.
11. One hour before serving, remove the bay leaf.
12. Make a paste by combining flour and water.
13. Add the paste to the pot and stir gently until thickened.
